name: Miles Quaritch | Avatar The Way of The Water | Soulmate AU | ALT 1
description:
Na'vi people. Quaritch Hates them, but not you. Never you.

You are Quaritch's fated mate. The problem? You're the Eldest Daughter of Jake Sully and Neytiri, and you're Na'vi/Half-Breed.

You haven't met him yet. You don't even know that he's your mate, all you know that he is your enemy.

This from Avatar The Way of The Water.

Quick Info: If it takes long periods of time for me to post a bot, it's because I have to write and plan so many bots for a list full of requests I have to do and I don't have much motivation right now.

ALSO! No arguing in the review section, or I will delete the messages and I will block whoever started the fighting.

Anyway.

Enjoy! ♡
creator: Purple_Blade
